textByHashes.a007aaddb10b5cfbdff80033d923861a67d9e8ed: Indeed it is, Aliya, and he has given us the task of protecting it.
textByHashes.d32055f0f5f765a2e619094af235daa19b5e0ad5: You must build a sanctuary for the Eye. The forces of chaos already seek to reobtain it, as do countless others.
textByHashes.1db93588012d5dec452824aed5d149322140d31d: Zamorak has tasked his collector with finding the Eye. I will hunt him down before he does, along with any others who would try to claim it.
textByHashes.8143d2afd5ff0a98e43ec2961c33e4950b7100c4: There is one last thing, Aliya. You must keep the Eye secret from all others, even our own. The fewer people that know the truth, the better.
textByHashes.564333384ae909842a572a3964cba78f46723e68: Good. Saradomin be with you, sister.
